metadata.title: Swift 2v1 Clutch on VALORANT with Tight Angles and Calm Aim
metadata.description:
Watch a quick 2v1 clutch where precise peeks and steady aim win the round. Timing the angles right really turned this fight around.
What’s your favorite spot to hold in VALORANT?
Share your clutch moments below!

Drop your best clutch plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch
